prestazioni: Engine swap to a **C20XE 16V 'Red Top'** (2.0L I4, 150hp stock) with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbo kit** (custom manifold by **Turbo Dynamics UK**), supporting **350hp on 98 RON fuel** with a **Haltech Elite 2500 ECU** (custom map by **Vauxhall Performance Centre**). Includes **ARP head studs**, **Ferrea 6000 series valves**, and a **PWR 4-row oil cooler** for sustained track use.

Full **polyurethane bushings** (complete kit by **SuperPro**) for the **GM T-platform chassis**, paired with **KW Clubsport coilovers (8-stage compression/rebound damping)** and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** to eliminate body roll in high-G corners. Front strut brace by **OMP** for rigidity.

Drivetrain upgrade with a **Quaife ATB helical LSD** (C20XE-specific) and **PPG 6-speed dog engagement gearset** (close-ratio, **2.95:1 final drive**). Clutch: **Sachs Performance twin-disc (240mm)** with **aluminum flywheel** (lightweight, **6.5kg**). Brakes: **AP Racing 4-piston calipers (330mm discs front, 280mm rear)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Goodridge braided lines**.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Astra GSi widebody kit** (fiberglass, **+50mm front/+70mm rear**), paired with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** (by **Seibon**) and **GT-style rear diffuser** (by **Apex Speed Technology**). Paint: **PPG 'Opel Signal Yellow' (custom mixed for 1990s authenticity)** with **matte black roof** and **gloss black OEM+ mirrors**.

**OMP Corsica carbon fiber seats** (fixed-back, **6-point harness compatible**) with **Sparco 6-point harnesses (FIA 8853/98)**. Steering wheel: **Momo Prototipo (350mm, suede)** with **NRG quick-release hub**. Roll cage: **Custom 8-point bolt-in (T45 steel) by Safety Devices UK**, painted **RAL 9005 (Jet Black)** for contrast.

**Hella Rallye 3000 headlights** (H4, **55W Cibie bulbs**) with **custom LED halo rings** (by **Luxx Lighting**). Rear: **OEM GSi taillights (clear lens, smoked internals)** with **Philips X-tremeVision bulbs**. Wheels: **BBS RS-GT II (17x9 +25 front, 17x10 +30 rear)** in **Gunmetal**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 (235/40/17 front, 265/35/17 rear)** for track use.
